title: allium bakeri
intro: Allium bakeri, commonly known as Baker's onion or California onion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the onion family (Alliaceae). It is native to the western United States and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Allium bakeri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, although it's essential to use it under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential interactions with medications.
